generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mom and a taxpayer, I've always believed in strong national security. But after seeing how our allies are cutting back on defense spending, I'm even more convinced we need to invest in our own strategic autonomy. It's not just about us—it's about protecting our families and values. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
